title: Stablecoin inflows rebound to $1.7B as Washington battles over yield rules
message_html: Stablecoin inflows rebound to $1.7B as Washington battles over yield rules ...
snippet: Messari said weekly stablecoin inflows rose 414% to $1.7 billion as debate over yield-bearing stablecoins continued to stall US crypto market structure talks.
